title: Docs MCP Server Starter
description: Configure which documentation sources the MCP server indexes and serves.

sources.title: Documentation sources
sources.description: List of documentation sources to index. Use a template ID for curated sources (nextjs, tailwind, react, typescript, prisma), or provide url + contentSelector for any custom site.

maxPagesPerSource.title: Max pages per source
maxPagesPerSource.description: Maximum pages to index per source. Pages beyond this cap are not indexed.

cacheMaxPages.title: Cache max pages
cacheMaxPages.description: Maximum pages to hold in memory. Oldest-fetched pages are evicted when exceeded.

markdownOutput.title: Markdown output
markdownOutput.description: Convert fetched page content to markdown. Disable for raw plain text.
